description_long: This is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and a black metal receiver and barrel. The rifle features a curved detachable box magazine, typical of the AK-47 family, and a prominent front sight post with a rear notch sight. The barrel is standard length and ends with a slotted flash hider. The trigger, magazine release, and safety lever are all visible, as are the gas tube and cleaning rod beneath the barrel. The overall design is robust, with a combination of wood and metal materials, giving it a utilitarian and rugged appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A robust assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. Features classic iron sights and a slotted flash hider.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and full length of the barrel with iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's end, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
